# Pycnometer

**Summary**: An instrument used to measure the density of liquids or solids.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-al-dogail|Al-Dogail, 2018]] used a pycnometer to determine the density of Calcium Bromide solutions.

## Key Results and Findings

- Measured densities ranging from 1.0 gm/cc up to 1.5 gm/cc for different concentration cases. ([[2018-al-dogail|Al-Dogail, 2018, p. 43]])
